headline: Frequently asked questions for families, volunteers, and supporters
subheadline: This page gathers the practical questions that usually come up first so families and volunteers can understand the basics before reaching out.

faq.question: Who can attend Camp Dream GA?
faq.answer: The public materials describe camp as serving children and young adults with disabilities, especially families looking for a traditional camp experience with stronger support.

faq.question: Is there medical support during camp?
faq.answer: Yes. The program structure includes medical volunteers and a support team to help campers participate more safely and confidently.

faq.question: Where is Summer Camp held?
faq.answer: Summer Camp is held at the Calvin Center in Hampton, Georgia.

faq.question: What kinds of activities happen at camp?
faq.answer: Camp life can include recreation, swimming, music, crafts, worship, meals, and time spent with cabin groups and volunteers.

cta.heading: Use the contact page if your question is specific to a camper, volunteer role, or upcoming session.
cta.body: The goal of the FAQ is to give people confidence before they need a one-to-one conversation.
